news.headline: UREDA Tenders 6.5 MW Rooftop Solar Projects on Government Buildings
news.summary: The Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency (UREDA) has invited bids under two tenders to select engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) contractors for grid-connected rooftop and small solar power projects at government buildings across the state.

news.headline: CERC Approves ₹2.15/kWh Tariff for 170 MW Neemuch Solar Project
news.summary: Listen to this article The Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) has adopted a tariff of ₹2.15 (~$0.0224)/kWh for a 170 MW solar project to be

news.headline: NLC India Announces Winner of 250 MW/500 MWh EPC Battery Storage Auction
news.summary: NLC India has announced the winner of its auction to set up a 250 MW/500 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) at the Tamil Nadu Transmission Corporation’s substations.

news.headline: Daily News Wrap-Up: India Adds 1.6 GW of Wind Capacity in Q1 2026
news.summary: India added nearly 1.6 GW of wind power capacity in the first quarter (Q1) of the calendar year 2026, up 14% quarter-over-quarter from 1.3 GW. The capacity additions fell 16% year-over-year (YoY) from 1.8 GW, according to Mercom India Research. India recorded its highest-ever annual wind capacity

news.headline: NTPC adds 5,488 MW renewable energy capacity in FY26
news.summary: NTPC Group has added 5,488 MW of renewable energy capacity during FY26 across solar, wind and pumped storage projects, strengthening its clean energy portfolio.

news.headline: Pace Digitek secures contract for 250 MW/500 MWh BESS in Tamil Nadu
news.summary: Pace Digitek Limited has secured a contract worth Rs 7,099.19 million from NLC India Renewables Limited for a 250 MW/500 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) in Tamil Nadu. The project will be developed across

news.headline: SECI announces results of 10 MW solar plus storage auction
news.summary: The Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) has announced BNC Power Projects as the winner of its auction to develop a 10 MW grid-connected solar project along with a 10 MW/20 MWh battery energy storage

news.headline: PSPCL announces results of 1 GWh BESS auction
news.summary: Punjab State Power Corporation Limited (PSPCL) has announced the results of its auction to set up 500 MW/1,000 MWh standalone battery energy storage system (BESS) projects in Punjab. Stockwell Solar won 150 MW/300 MWh capacity

news.headline: Waaree secures green hydrogen project order in Karnataka
news.summary: Waaree Clean Energy Solutions Private Limited (WCES), a wholly owned subsidiary of Waaree Energies Limited, has secured an order to develop a multi-technology green hydrogen project at TMEIC Industrial Systems India Private Limited’s facility in

news.headline: Sunraycer Renewables secures $901 million for solar and BESS projects in Texas
news.summary: Sunraycer Renewables has secured a $901 million project financing facility from MUFG Bank Limited., Ally Bank, Nomura Securities International, Inc., Norddeutsche Landesbank Girozentrale, and Societe Generale. The financing package comprises a construction-to-term loan, a tax

news.headline: Iberdrola to commission 195 MW wind farm in Portugal
news.summary: Iberdrola has commissioned the 195 MW Tâmega Norte wind farm in Portugal. Located between Braga and Vila Real, in the municipalities of Cabeceiras de Basto and Montalegre, theTâmega Norte wind farm is an onshore wind

news.headline: Renewable Energy Growth Slows Emissions Rise in 2025, Says IEA – EQ
news.summary: In Short : Rising deployment of renewable energy helped curb the growth of global carbon emissions in 2025, according to the International Energy Agency. Increased use of solar, wind, and other clean sources reduced dependence on fossil fuels, limiting emissions expansion. The trend highlights the c

news.headline: Higher Sales Volume Pushes Premier Energies’ Revenue Up 40% YoY in Q4 FY 2026
news.summary: Solar module and cell manufacturer Premier Energies has posted revenue of ₹22.7 billion (~$237.12 million) in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY) 2026, up 40.1% year-over-year (YoY) from ₹16.2 billion (~$169 million).

news.headline: Fujiyama Commissions 2 GW Solar Module Manufacturing Plant in Madhya Pradesh
news.summary: Listen to this article Rooftop solar solutions company Fujiyama Power Systems has commissioned a 2,000 MW solar module manufacturing facility in Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. In

news.headline: SJVN’s Q4 FY 2026 Revenue Soars 197%, Loss Narrows
news.summary: Government-owned power generation company SJVN’s revenue rose 196.7% to ₹14.96 billion (~$156.31 million) in the fourth quarter of the financial year (FY) 2026 from ₹5.04 billion (~$52.66 million) in the same period last year.

news.headline: PFC’s FY 2026 Net Profit Rises 10% YoY, Loan Asset Book Tops ₹11.64 Trillion
news.summary: State-owned lender to the energy sector, Power Finance Corporation (PFC), has reported consolidated revenue from operations of ₹289.20 billion (~$3.03 billion) in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY) 2026…

news.headline: EESL Invites Bids for Feasibility and Project Reports for Solar Projects

news.headline: Chhattisgarh Proposes ₹3.4/kWh Levelized Tariff for Solar Projects Up to 2 MW
news.summary: The Chhattisgarh State Electricity Regulatory Commission (CSERC) has proposed a generic levelized tariff of ₹3.40 (~$0.04)/kWh for solar photovoltaic projects between 500 kW and 2 MW and ₹4.95 (~$0.05)/kWh for biogas-based power projects commissioned in the financial year (FY) 2026-27. The propos

news.headline: JSW Energy commissions 250 MW of renewable energy capacity, including hydro, since April 2026
news.summary: JSW Energy has commissioned 250 MW of renewable energy capacity since April 2026, comprising 130 MW of wind, 69.4 MW of solar, and the 50 MW Tidong Hydro Plant. With this addition, its total installed power generation capacity has reached 13.7 GW.

news.headline: POWERGRID floats tender for 150 MW/300 MWh BESS project in Andhra Pradesh
news.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has invited tender for design, supply, erection, testing and commissioning of a 150 MW/300 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) project at Kalikiri in Andhra Pradesh. The package

news.headline: Fujiyama commissions solar panel manufacturing facility in Madhya Pradesh
news.summary: Fujiyama Power Systems Limited has commissioned a 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing facility at Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. The facility is part of the company’s greenfield manufacturing expansion programme, and has been planned with manufacturing capacities

news.headline: IGL invites bids to set up 200 MW solar project in Rajasthan
news.summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) has invited bids for the setting up of a 200 MWdc (160 MWac) solar power project in Rajasthan. The project will also include an integrated battery energy storage system (BESS).  The

news.headline: Mainstream achieves commercial operations for Ckhúri wind farm in Chile
news.summary: Mainstream Renewable Power has announced that it has received commercial operations date (COD) certification for the Ckhúri Wind Farm from the National Electricity Coordinator. The project is located in Calama in the Antofagasta Region, Chile.

news.headline: Inox Clean buys US assets of Boviet Solar
news.summary: Through this asset purchase, Inox Clean gains an operational capacity of 3 GW of TOPCon solar module manufacturing in the United States, positioning it in line with the “Make in America, For America” initiative.

news.headline: Avaada Group Surpasses 17.7 GWp Renewable Portfolio; Over 7.2 GWp Operational and ~ 10.5 GWp Under Construction – EQ
news.summary: With over 7.2 GWp operational and ~ 10.5 GWp under construction, the company aims to accelerate the country’s green energy transition.
